violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. - Deli ham found in open bag- staff put into new bag and dated.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. - Paper container used for mini tacos found in pizza prep cooler with spoons for sauce in it. Staff removed.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Kitchen Handwash sin found without paper towels
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
